actual_net_cash_month12_eur.rationale: Year-1 cash from 1,500-unit sell-through at €99 × ~45% gross margin ≈ €67k less ~€140k overhead = negative; base just below the €50k trigger reflects realistic Pragmatic Foundation execution.

actual_sellthrough_share.rationale: Risk 2 names 50% sell-through as the binary-bet failure scenario; base just below the 75% target reflects realistic prepper-market depth against the €99/€149 two-tier offer.

actual_year1_gross_profit_eur.rationale: Plan estimates €89k gross profit at €99 baseline; base near that figure; upper bound captures two-tier success where €149 enclosures dominate the mix per Risk 4 mitigation.

actual_presale_conversion_share.rationale: Expert Issue 1 sensitivity: 2% conversion (vs assumed 5%) yields only 600 pre-sales of 1,500 needed; base just below the 5% floor; upper bound reflects strong prepper-forum traction.

actual_eu_emc_cert_cost_eur.rationale: Issue 2 names a 30–50% cost-escalation scenario if the product fails initial tests; base reflects a single re-test cycle; upper bound captures a combo-SKU redesign trigger (Risk 8).

presale_conversion_target_share.rationale: Expert Issue 1 recommends 5% as the production-justification floor; spread reflects how strictly downstream production-commitment decisions interpret the threshold.

eu_emc_cert_budget_eur.rationale: Plan budgets €80k; Issue 2 recommends a 40% contingency (€32k) on top, raising the realistic ceiling to ~€110k; spread captures whether the contingency is formalized.
